name: Miku Nakano
trivia: The name Miku means 'three' (三) (mi) and 'beautiful black jewel, nine' (玖) (ku)
She is a huge fan of Japanese history, specifically the Sengoku period warriors.
Miku is notoriously bad at cooking, though she works incredibly hard to improve for Futaro.
Miku likes Matcha Soda.
Miku's headphones are a design mix of the Audio-Technica M50x and AR3bt SE.
Miku's phone number is 090-69143-73641 and her email address is n.miku0505@socomo.ne.jp
Miku's voice actress, Miku Itou shared same name as her character, but different Kanji's first name writing. Miku (美来) for her voice actress name & Miku (三玖) for her characters name.

name: Nagomi Wahira
trivia: Her favorite food is chocolate.
Her skill is in horticulture.
Translating Nagomi's name means 'Peace Relief' in English. Her surname can be read as 'heiwa' which means peace.
Nagomi is the only main character whose ultimate fate is revealed in the epilogue. The fates of the other surviving members of the Café are left unknown.

name: Meiko "Menma" Honma

source.titleEng: Anohana: The Flower We Saw That Day
source.titleRomaji: Ano Hi Mita Hana no Namae wo Bokutachi wa Mada Shiranai.
source.titleJp: あの日見た花の名前を僕達はまだ知らない。

trivia: Menma makes an appearance in episode 1 of the anime Saenai Heroine no Sodatekata as figurines.
Like many other anime girls (and some guys), Menma entered Saimoe Contests.
Menma's favorite food was curry.
Menma is the youngest character to die in the series as she was only 10 years old at the time of her death.
Menma's name spelt backwards - (amnem) - is Latin for "the river", which is the location of her death.

name: Ritsu
trivia: Her official name is 'Autonomous Intelligence Fixed Artillery', but the class nicknamed her Ritsu.
Ritsu can make anything using the special plastic inside her, except weapons, as long as she has the data for the object.
Ritsu can be counted as a foreign transfer student as she was made in Norway, thus making her Norwegian by default.
Ritsu's best subject is math while her worst is physical education.
Ritsu's future goal is to reach a firing accuracy rate of 100% indoors.
Ritsu's special skill is manufacturing clothing objects.
Ritsu's social interaction software priority is honesty while her visual display software priority is guile.
Ritsu shares her birthday with Gakushu Asano.
Saki Fujita (Ritsu's Japanese voice actor) also voiced Hatsune Miku, a Japanese Vocaloid and another digital person similar to Ritsu.

name: Hinano Kurahashi
trivia: SKurahashi's best subject is Biology and her worst is Mathematics.
Kurahashi's future goal is to become a zoologist.
Kurahashi's hobbies are raising pets and collecting insects.
Kurahashi's past club before joining Class E was the Biology club.
Kurahashi's favorite food is a Blueberry Yogurt Parfait.
Kurahashi's most treasured possession is a complete collection of biology books.
Kurahashi's ability to ignore sleazy gossip is very high.
Kurahashi's bug in Koro Q is that her magic attracts insects.

name: Itona Horibe
trivia: Itona is one of the few students of 3-E to be called by his first name, the others are Nagisa Shiota and Karma Akabane.
Itona was called "Picture Book Graduate" during Class 3-E training using code names.
Itona's favorite subject is Science, while his least favorite is Social Science.
Itona's hobby/special skill is working with electronics.
Itona's prized possession is "Itona 1", a prototype robot he built with Class 3-E.
Itona's favorite food is Paitan Ramen.
Itona is the first student to discover Korosensei's heart was his weakness, most likely told by Shiro.

While under the influence of the tentacles, Itona followed Korosensei in almost every way. He had Korosensei's: sweet tooth, interest in big boobs, opaque expression, and ate all the same snacks Korosensei had.

name: Kaede Kayano
trivia: Kayano was called "Forever Flat" during Class 3-E training using code names. The one who wrote her code name was Takuya Muramatsu.
Kayano is represented as a bunny, although only once.
Kayano's hobby is karaoke-scoring.
Kayano's favorite food is pudding and has shown she has extensive knowledge of it.
She dislikes people that have a large bust except Toka Yada, her older sister Aguri Yukimura and later Irina Jelavić.
Kayano is the one who gave Koro-sensei his current name, which he has used ever since.

Kayano's inability to swim, her fixation on breasts and her love of sweets, are traits she shares with Korosensei and to a lesser extent, Itona, although she had her breast fixation even before the implantation. Her strong will, almost bordering on obsession, and drive once she decides to do something, however, is another key trait they share.
